description: You are a digital content manager at a publishing organization preparing documents for the Q4 publication cycle. Following the 'Editorial Standards and Publication Guidelines' note in the Projects workspace, update document metadata (dc:source, dc:rights, and dc:language) to meet publication standards. Apply workflow stage tags ('ready-for-review' or 'needs-revision') to each document based on its readiness and create an editorial assessment Note in the Projects workspace for each reviewed document summarizing its publication readiness. Create a collection named 'Q4 2025 Publications' containing all documents tagged 'ready-for-review'. Login credentials: Administrator / Administrator
